Name: UVectorFieldComponent
Description: A Component referencing a vector field.

Variables.Name: Intensity
Variables.Description: The intensity at which the vector field is applied.

Variables.Name: Tightness
Variables.Description: How tightly particles follow the vector field.

Variables.Name: bPreviewVectorField
Variables.Description: If true, the vector field is only used for preview visualizations.

Functions.Name: SetIntensity
Functions.Description: Set the intensity of the vector field.

Params.Name: NewIntensity
Params.Description: - The new intensity of the vector field.
